description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The front of the house includes a driveway with a parked car and a tiled entry path leading to the main entrance. The backyard is landscaped with trees and shrubs, and features a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by lounge chairs and a patio area. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor areas. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, enhancing the connection between indoor and outdoor living. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, geometric forms, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with a white facade, large windows, a driveway, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and a car parked outside, with a glimpse of the backyard greenery and pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the pool, patio, and extensive landscaping in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, patio, and outdoor lounge area, with visible balconies and terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, entry path, and a clear view of the backyard's trees and pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, tiled steps, and a simple door adjacent to the driveway
